function_v0.doc:
Pause the contract (emergency stop)

When paused, all player-facing functions are disabled except admin functions.
This is an emergency mechanism to protect player funds in case of discovered vulnerabilities.

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the admin
function_v0.name: pause

function_v0.doc: Check if a contract is an approved game
function_v0.name: is_game

function_v0.doc:
Unpause the contract

Restores normal contract functionality after emergency pause.

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the admin
function_v0.name: unpause

function_v0.doc:
Update the contract WASM hash (upgrade contract)

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the admin
function_v0.name: upgrade

function_v0.doc:
Add or update a game contract registration

Registers a game contract with a developer address for reward distribution.
Can be called multiple times to update the developer address.

# Arguments
* `game_id` - Address of the game contract to register
* `developer` - Address to receive developer rewards for this game

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the admin
function_v0.name: add_game

function_v0.doc:
End a game session with outcome verification

Requires game contract authorization. Both players' FP wagers are spent/burned.
Only the winner's wager contributes to their faction standings.

Outcome verification is handled by the individual game contracts.
Each game is responsible for implementing its own verification mechanism
(multi-sig oracle, ZK proofs, etc.) before calling this function.

# Arguments
* `session_id` - The unique session identifier
* `player1_won` - true if player1 won, false if player2 won

# Errors
* `SessionNotFound` - If session doesn't exist
* `InvalidSessionState` - If session is not Pending
* `GameExpired` - If game is from a previous epoch
function_v0.name: end_game

function_v0.doc: Get the admin address
function_v0.name: get_admin

function_v0.doc:
Get epoch information for a specific epoch

# Arguments
* `epoch` - The epoch number to retrieve

# Errors
* `EpochNotFinalized` - If requested epoch doesn't exist
function_v0.name: get_epoch

function_v0.doc: Check if contract is paused
function_v0.name: is_paused

function_v0.doc:
Update the admin address

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the current admin
function_v0.name: set_admin

function_v0.doc: Get the current configuration
function_v0.name: get_config

function_v0.doc:
Get player information

Returns complete persistent player data including selected faction, total deposited,
and deposit timestamp.

# Errors
* `PlayerNotFound` - If player has never interacted with the contract
function_v0.name: get_player

function_v0.doc:
Start a new game session

Locks factions and fp for both players. If this is a player's first game
in the epoch, initializes their fp and locks their faction.

# Errors
* `GameNotWhitelisted` - If game_id is not approved
* `SessionAlreadyExists` - If session_id already exists
* `InvalidAmount` - If wagers are <= 0
* `PlayerNotFound` - If players don't exist
* `InsufficientFactionPoints` - If players don't have enough fp
* `ContractPaused` - If contract is in emergency pause mode
function_v0.name: start_game

function_v0.doc:
Cycle to the next epoch

Finalizes current epoch (determines winner, withdraws BLND, swaps to USDC,
sets reward pool) and opens next epoch.

# Returns
The new epoch number

# Errors
* `EpochNotReady` - If not enough time has passed
* `EpochAlreadyFinalized` - If current epoch is already finalized
* `FeeVaultError` - If fee-vault operations fail
* `SwapError` - If BLND \xe2\x86\x92 USDC swap fails
function_v0.name: cycle_epoch

function_v0.doc:
Remove a game contract from the approved list

Note: If the game has contributions in the current epoch, those will be
forfeited (developer cannot claim rewards for removed games).

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the admin
function_v0.name: remove_game

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the contract

Sets up the admin, external contract addresses, and creates the first epoch.

# Arguments
* `admin` - Admin address (can modify config and upgrade contract)
* `fee_vault` - fee-vault-v2 contract address
* `soroswap_router` - Soroswap router contract address
* `blnd_token` - BLND token address
* `usdc_token` - USDC token address
* `epoch_duration` - Duration of each epoch in seconds (default: 345,600 = 4 days)
* `reserve_token_ids` - Reserve token IDs for claiming BLND emissions (e.g., vec![&env, 1] for reserve 0 b-tokens)
* `free_fp_per_epoch` - Base FP granted to all players each epoch (enables free play)
* `min_deposit_to_claim` - Minimum vault balance required to claim rewards (anti-sybil)
* `dev_reward_share` - Portion of epoch rewards for game developers (7 decimals, e.g., 1_000_000 = 10%)
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Update global configuration

Allows admin to update specific configuration parameters.
Only updates parameters that are provided (non-None).

# Arguments
* `new_fee_vault` - New fee-vault-v2 contract address (optional)
* `new_soroswap_router` - New Soroswap router contract address (optional)
* `new_blnd_token` - New BLND token address (optional)
* `new_usdc_token` - New USDC token address (optional)
* `new_epoch_duration` - New epoch duration in seconds (optional)
* `new_reserve_token_ids` - New reserve token IDs for claiming BLND emissions (optional)
* `new_free_fp_per_epoch` - New base FP for free play (optional)
* `new_min_deposit_to_claim` - New minimum deposit to claim rewards (optional)
* `new_dev_reward_share` - New portion of epoch rewards for game developers (optional)

# Errors
* `NotAdmin` - If caller is not the admin
function_v0.name: update_config

function_v0.doc:
Select a faction for the player

Sets the player's persistent faction preference. Can be changed at ANY time.
If you haven't played a game this epoch, the new faction applies immediately.
If you've already played this epoch, the current epoch stays locked to your
old faction, and the new selection applies starting next epoch.

# Arguments
* `faction` - Faction ID (0=WholeNoodle, 1=PointyStick, 2=SpecialRock)

# Errors
* `InvalidFaction` - If faction ID is not 0, 1, or 2
function_v0.name: select_faction

function_v0.doc:
Claim developer reward for a game in a specific epoch

Game developers can claim their share of the epoch's dev reward pool
proportional to the total FP contributed through their game.

**Note:** To check claimable amounts or claim status before calling,
use transaction simulation. This is the idiomatic Soroban pattern.

# Returns
Amount of USDC claimed and transferred to developer

# Errors
* `GameNotRegistered` - If game is not registered
* `NotGameDeveloper` - If caller is not the registered developer
* `EpochNotFinalized` - If epoch doesn't exist or isn't finalized
* `DevRewardAlreadyClaimed` - If already claimed for this game/epoch
* `GameNoContributions` - If game has no contributions this epoch
* `ContractPaused` - If contract is in emergency pause mode
function_v0.name: claim_dev_reward

function_v0.doc:
Get player's epoch-specific information for any epoch

Returns complete epoch-specific data including locked faction, available FP,
total FP contributed, and balance snapshot. Consistent with `get_epoch(epoch)`
which also requires an epoch parameter.

**Behavior for current epoch:** If player hasn't played any games this epoch yet,
calculates what their FP WOULD be based on current vault balance without writing
to storage. This allows UIs to display FP before the player's first game.

**Behavior for historical epochs:** Only returns data if player participated in
that epoch (played at least one game).

# Arguments
* `epoch` - Epoch number to query
* `player` - Player address

# Examples
```ignore
// Current epoch
let current = contract.get_current_epoch();
let player_data = contract.get_epoch_player(&current, &player)?;

// Historical epoch
let epoch0_data = contract.get_epoch_player(&0, &player)?;
```

# Errors
* `FactionNotSelected` - If querying current epoch and player hasn't selected faction
* `PlayerNot
function_v0.name: get_epoch_player

function_v0.doc:
Get the current epoch number

# Returns
The current epoch number
function_v0.name: get_current_epoch

function_v0.doc:
Claim epoch reward for a player for a specific epoch

Players who contributed FP to the winning faction can claim their share
of the epoch's reward pool (USDC converted from BLND yield).

**Note:** To check claimable amounts or claim status before calling,
use transaction simulation. This is the idiomatic Soroban pattern.

# Returns
Amount of USDC claimed

# Errors
* `EpochNotFinalized` - If epoch doesn't exist or isn't finalized
* `RewardAlreadyClaimed` - If player already claimed for this epoch
* `NotWinningFaction` - If player wasn't in the winning faction
* `NoRewardsAvailable` - If player has no rewards to claim
* `ContractPaused` - If contract is in emergency pause mode
function_v0.name: claim_epoch_reward

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Global configuration

Stores contract configuration parameters.
Note: Admin address is stored separately via DataKey::Admin for single source of truth.
Note: Pause state is stored separately via DataKey::Paused for efficient access.
udt_struct_v0.name: Config

fields.doc: BLND token address
fields.name: blnd_token

fields.doc: Developer reward share as fixed-point (7 decimals)\nPortion of epoch rewards allocated to game developers\nDefault: 1_000_000 (10% = 0.10 with 7 decimals)
fields.name: dev_reward_share

fields.doc: Duration of each epoch in seconds (default: 4 days = 345,600 seconds)
fields.name: epoch_duration

fields.doc: fee-vault-v2 contract address
fields.name: fee_vault

fields.doc: Base FP granted to all players each epoch regardless of deposit (7 decimals)\nEnables "free play" where players can participate without depositing\nDefault: 100_0000000 (100 FP)
fields.name: free_fp_per_epoch

fields.doc: Minimum vault balance required to claim epoch rewards (7 decimals)\nAnti-sybil mechanism: players must deposit to extract value\nDefault: 1_0000000 (1 USDC)
fields.name: min_deposit_to_claim

fields.doc:
Reserve token IDs for claiming BLND emissions from Blend pool
Formula: reserve_index * 2 + token_type
token_type: 0 = debt token, 1 = b-token (suppliers)
Example: For reserve 0 b-tokens (suppliers), use [1]
fields.name: reserve_token_ids

fields.doc: Soroswap router contract address
fields.name: soroswap_router

fields.doc: USDC token address
fields.name: usdc_token

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Persistent player data (across all epochs)

Stores the player's faction preference and time multiplier tracking.
This persists across epoch boundaries.
udt_struct_v0.name: Player

fields.doc: Player's vault balance from the previous epoch (for cross-epoch comparison)\nUsed to detect >50% withdrawal between epochs
fields.name: last_epoch_balance

fields.doc: The player's persistent faction selection (can be changed between epochs)
fields.name: selected_faction

fields.doc: Timestamp when the time multiplier calculation started\nSet when player plays their first game (with vault balance > 0)\nReset to current time if player withdraws >50% between epochs
fields.name: time_multiplier_start

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Game registration info (Persistent storage)

Stores the developer address for whitelisted games.
Used to track FP contributions and developer reward claims.
udt_struct_v0.name: GameInfo

fields.doc: Developer address who receives reward share for this game
fields.name: developer

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Per-epoch game contribution tracking (Temporary storage)

Tracks total FP contributed through a game during an epoch.
Used to calculate developer's share of the reward pool.
udt_struct_v0.name: EpochGame

fields.doc: Total FP from all games (both player wagers combined)
fields.name: total_fp_contributed

udt_struct_v0.doc: Epoch metadata\n\nStores all information about an epoch including timing, standings, and rewards.
udt_struct_v0.name: EpochInfo

fields.doc: Developer reward pool (portion of rewards for game developers)\nSet during cycle_epoch: total_rewards * dev_reward_share
fields.name: dev_reward_pool

fields.doc: Unix timestamp when this epoch ends (start_time + epoch_duration)
fields.name: end_time

fields.doc: Map of faction_id -> total fp contributed by all players\nUsed to determine the winning faction
fields.name: faction_standings

fields.doc: True if epoch has been finalized via cycle_epoch
fields.name: is_finalized

fields.doc: Total USDC available for player reward distribution (set during cycle_epoch)\nThis is 90% of total rewards (after dev share is deducted)
fields.name: reward_pool

fields.doc: Unix timestamp when this epoch started
fields.name: start_time

fields.doc: Total FP wagered across all games this epoch\nUsed to calculate each game's share of the dev reward pool
fields.name: total_game_fp

fields.doc: The winning faction (None until epoch is finalized)
fields.name: winning_faction

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Per-epoch player data

Created when a player first interacts with the contract in a new epoch.
Tracks faction points and epoch-specific faction lock.
FP is calculated once at first game of epoch based on vault balance.
udt_struct_v0.name: EpochPlayer

fields.doc: Available faction points (not locked in games)\nCalculated once at first game of epoch and remains valid until next epoch
fields.name: available_fp

fields.doc: Player's vault balance snapshot at first game of this epoch\nCaptures the vault balance used to calculate this epoch's FP
fields.name: epoch_balance_snapshot

fields.doc: The faction locked in for this epoch (locked on first game)\nNone = not yet locked, Some(faction_id) = locked
fields.name: epoch_faction

fields.doc: Total faction points contributed to the player's faction this epoch\nUsed for reward distribution calculation
fields.name: total_fp_contributed

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Game session tracking

Created when a game starts, updated when it ends.
Tracks all game state including players, wagers, and outcome.
udt_struct_v0.name: GameSession

fields.doc: Epoch when this game was created\nUsed to prevent games from being completed in a different epoch
fields.name: epoch_id

fields.doc: Address of the game contract
fields.name: game_id

fields.doc: First player's address
fields.name: player1

fields.doc: Faction points wagered by player1
fields.name: player1_wager

fields.doc: Winner of the game (None = pending, Some = completed)\ntrue = player1 won, false = player2 won
fields.name: player1_won

fields.doc: Second player's address
fields.name: player2

fields.doc: Faction points wagered by player2
fields.name: player2_wager

udt_error_enum_v0.doc:
Error codes for the Blendizzard contract

All errors are represented as u32 values for efficient storage and transmission.
Error codes are grouped by category for better organization.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: Error

cases.doc: Player has insufficient faction points for the requested wager
cases.name: InsufficientFactionPoints

cases.doc: Amount is invalid (e.g., zero or negative)
cases.name: InvalidAmount

cases.doc: Faction ID is invalid (must be 0, 1, or 2)
cases.name: InvalidFaction

cases.doc: Player's faction is already locked for this epoch (cannot change)
cases.name: FactionAlreadyLocked

cases.doc: Player does not exist (no deposits or interactions yet)
cases.name: PlayerNotFound

cases.doc: Player must select a faction before playing games
cases.name: FactionNotSelected

cases.doc: Game contract is not in the whitelist
cases.name: GameNotWhitelisted

cases.doc: Game session was not found
cases.name: SessionNotFound

cases.doc: Game session with this ID already exists
cases.name: SessionAlreadyExists

cases.doc: Game session is in an invalid state for this operation
cases.name: InvalidSessionState

cases.doc: Game outcome data is invalid
cases.name: InvalidGameOutcome

cases.doc: Game is from a previous epoch and cannot be completed
cases.name: GameExpired

cases.doc: Epoch has not been finalized yet
cases.name: EpochNotFinalized

cases.doc: Epoch has already been finalized
cases.name: EpochAlreadyFinalized

cases.doc: Epoch cannot be cycled yet (not enough time has passed)
cases.name: EpochNotReady

cases.doc: No rewards available for this player in this epoch
cases.name: NoRewardsAvailable

cases.doc: Reward has already been claimed for this epoch
cases.name: RewardAlreadyClaimed

cases.doc: Player was not in the winning faction for this epoch
cases.name: NotWinningFaction

cases.doc: Player must deposit minimum amount to claim rewards (anti-sybil)
cases.name: DepositRequiredToClaim

cases.doc: Soroswap swap operation failed
cases.name: SwapError

cases.doc: Arithmetic overflow occurred
cases.name: OverflowError

cases.doc: Division by zero attempted
cases.name: DivisionByZero

cases.doc: Contract is paused (emergency stop activated)
cases.name: ContractPaused

cases.doc: Game is not registered (for dev claims)
cases.name: GameNotRegistered

cases.doc: Game has no contributions in this epoch
cases.name: GameNoContributions

cases.doc: Developer has already claimed reward for this game/epoch
cases.name: DevRewardAlreadyClaimed

cases.doc: Caller is not the registered developer for this game
cases.name: NotGameDeveloper

tuple_v0.doc: Player persistent data - Player(player_address) -> Player (Persistent storage)
tuple_v0.name: Player

tuple_v0.doc: Player epoch-specific data - EpochPlayer(epoch_number, player_address) -> EpochPlayer (Temporary storage)
tuple_v0.name: EpochPlayer

tuple_v0.doc: Game session data - Session(session_id) -> GameSession (Temporary storage)
tuple_v0.name: Session

tuple_v0.doc: Registered game contracts - Game(game_address) -> GameInfo (Persistent storage)
tuple_v0.name: Game

tuple_v0.doc: Per-epoch game contribution - EpochGame(epoch_number, game_address) -> EpochGame (Temporary storage)
tuple_v0.name: EpochGame

tuple_v0.doc: Reward claim tracking - Claimed(player_address, epoch_number) -> bool (Temporary storage)
tuple_v0.name: Claimed

tuple_v0.doc: Developer reward claim tracking - DevClaimed(game_address, epoch_number) -> bool (Temporary storage)
tuple_v0.name: DevClaimed
